settings.heading: Calm rituals for luminous skin.
settings.text: Lumae combines dermatology-inspired actives, sensorial textures, and a simple routine for people who want effective skincare without excess.
settings.visual_note: A fictional product line created to demonstrate a complete Shopify experience.

settings.text: The project prioritizes purchase clarity: a short routine, visible benefits, complete product pages, and an editorial visual system that elevates the brand.

settings.title: Cleanse
settings.text: A soft gel-cream cleanser that removes impurities and prepares the skin without tightness.

settings.title: Treat
settings.text: Serums with niacinamide, antioxidants, and smart hydration for a daily routine.

settings.title: Protect
settings.text: Moisturizer, night oil, and SPF to support barrier care, glow, and comfort.

settings.heading: Fewer steps, more consistency.
settings.text: The store architecture organizes products by moment of use, reducing decision fatigue and making the buying path more intuitive.

settings.heading: Fictional brand, real shopping flow.
settings.text: Lumae was designed to demonstrate visual direction, ecommerce UX, and customization of a modern Shopify theme.
settings.panel_text: A routine-led homepage, collection with native filters, product pages that answer pre-purchase questions, and Dawn's cart preserved for reliability.

settings.title: Light texture
settings.text: The routine feels premium while staying easy to understand.

settings.title: Guided shopping
settings.text: The pages make it clear which product belongs to each moment of the routine.

settings.title: Consistent visuals
settings.text: The art direction supports a premium perception across the entire journey.

settings.heading: A store designed to convert without feeling generic.
settings.text: Fictional testimonials help demonstrate hierarchy, trust, and storytelling in the shopping flow.

settings.heading: Get rituals, launches, and behind-the-scenes notes.

settings.text: A fictional newsletter block to demonstrate lead capture inside the Shopify theme.
